changelog.summary: Health endpoint exposes fast-context hash, files, length, and Nathan birthdate sentinel for deployment freshness checks
Unanswered text questions now return fixed DEFER reply; removed extra local-fallback suffix
Photo replies: preserve newlines (label, description, caption only); remove LLM ack line
Telegram-only chat; async Cursor via scheduled inbox triage; removed Google Chat and live repository_dispatch
Persistent Redis history: last 20 messages per chat (no TTL by default)
